html:
{% set vehicle = frappe.get_doc("Vehicle Inventory", doc.vehicle_inventory) %}
Vehicle Evaluation Report

{{ doc.name }}

Vehicle Details

Registration: {{ vehicle.registration_number }}

Manufacturer: {{ vehicle.manufacturer }}

Model: {{ vehicle.model }}

Year: {{ vehicle.year_of_manufacture }}

Vehicle Images

{% if vehicle.vehicle_image %} {% endif %}

Inspection Checklist

{% for item in doc.evaluation_checklist %} {% endfor %}
Parameter Rating
{{ item.component }} {{ item.rating }}

Evaluation Summary

Refurbishment Cost: ₹ {{ doc.refurbishment_cost }}

Recommended Price: ₹ {{ doc.recommended_price }}

Expected Profit: ₹ {{ doc.expected_profit }}

Evaluator Notes

{{ doc.notes or "No remarks provided" }}

Final Verdict: {{ doc.overall_condition }}

Evaluator: {{ doc.evaluator }}

Signature: ______________________

Date: {{ frappe.utils.today() }}

Scan for Verification
name: Vehicle Evaluation Report
